data.title: Options Corner: Cinemark's Short Squeeze Won't Prevent The Credits From Eventually Rolling
data.description: While Cinemark may be a beneficiary of short-squeeze speculation, CNK stock may eventually fade, opening the door for a bearish strategy.

data.title: Clover Health Shares Surge After Strong Q1 Earnings, Now Up 409% Over Past Year
data.description: Clover Health Investments saw its shares jump more than 12% on Wednesday. Following better-than-expected profitability in the first-quarter, despite missing revenue estimates.

data.title: $1000 Invested In NRG Energy 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
Alibaba Stock Drops After US Lawmakers Push For Delisting
data.description: Alibaba shares are trading lower Wednesday after two senior U.S. lawmakers called on the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to delist it along with other Chinese companies.

data.title: Arista's Stock Hit As Analysts Cut Targets Over Tariff Uncertainty Despite Strong AI Demand
data.description: Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) stock dropped after analysts lowered price targets. EPS beat estimates, but outlook remains conservative due to tariff uncertainty.
